en: Login provider display name: Sign in with Apple.

en: WeChat
Custom SMS Sender

el: When enabled, this site's phone verification codes are sent through your own endpoint under your own signature; disable it to use the platform default. Requires the phone-number login provider to be enabled.
en: When enabled, this site's phone verification codes are sent through your own endpoint under your own signature; disable it to use the platform default. Requires the phone-number login provider to be enabled.
zh: 开启后，本站发出的手机验证码短信将由你自己的接口用你自己的签名发送；关闭则使用平台默认签名。需先启用「手机号」登录方式。

en: https://your-domain/sms-webhook

el: Placeholder for the SMS webhook URL input
en: Placeholder for the SMS webhook URL input
zh: 短信 webhook URL 输入框占位

el: Signing secret (leave blank to keep unchanged)
en: Signing secret (leave blank to keep unchanged)
zh: 签名密钥（留空则保持不变）

en: Use a custom sender
View docs
Test

el: Enable the phone-number login provider first to configure a custom SMS sender.
en: Enable the phone-number login provider first to configure a custom SMS sender.
zh: 需先启用「手机号」登录方式才能配置自定义短信发件地址。

en: Custom SMS Sender · Webhook spec
zh: 自定义短信发件地址 · 接口说明

el: This site sends a signed HTTPS POST to the URL you provide; your service is responsible for delivering the SMS. Your endpoint must meet the following requirements:
en: This site sends a signed HTTPS POST to the URL you provide; your service is responsible for delivering the SMS. Your endpoint must meet the following requirements:
zh: 本站会向你填写的地址发起一次带签名的 HTTPS POST 请求，由你的服务负责下发短信。请确保你的接口满足以下要求：

en: Request

el: Method POST, Content-Type application/json. purpose is one of login / register / test (test is a connectivity probe — you may skip actually sending). The request body looks like:
en: Method POST, Content-Type application/json. purpose is one of login / register / test (test is a connectivity probe — you may skip actually sending). The request body looks like:
zh: 方法为 POST，Content-Type 为 application/json。purpose 可能为 login / register / test（test 为连通性测试，可不实际下发短信）。请求体结构如下：

en: Signature verification

el: Each request carries the headers below. Verify with your signing secret using HMAC-SHA256 per the Standard Webhooks spec and compare in constant time:
en: Each request carries the headers below. Verify with your signing secret using HMAC-SHA256 per the Standard Webhooks spec and compare in constant time:
zh: 每次请求附带以下请求头，请用你的签名密钥按 Standard Webhooks 规范做 HMAC-SHA256 校验，并使用常量时间比较：

en: Response

el: Return 2xx on success. To signal failure explicitly, return HTTP 200 with a JSON body whose success field is false (see the example below). Respond within 5 seconds.
en: Return 2xx on success. To signal failure explicitly, return HTTP 200 with a JSON body whose success field is false (see the example below). Respond within 5 seconds.
zh: 下发成功请返回 2xx；如需显式表示失败，可返回 HTTP 200，且 body 中 success 字段为 false（见下方示例）。请在 5 秒内响应。

en: Test custom SMS sender
zh: 测试自定义短信发件地址

en: Country/region code
Test phone number (optional)
Send test

el: The test request was delivered to your endpoint successfully.
en: The test request was delivered to your endpoint successfully.
zh: 测试请求已成功送达你的接口。

el: Test failed. Check the URL, signing secret, and your endpoint's response.
en: Test failed. Check the URL, signing secret, and your endpoint's response.
zh: 测试失败，请检查地址、签名密钥与接口返回。

en: Disable custom SMS sender
zh: 关闭自定义短信发件地址

el: Disabling this deletes the saved sender URL and signing secret (the secret cannot be recovered), and this site falls back to the platform default signature. Disable it?
en: Disabling this deletes the saved sender URL and signing secret (the secret cannot be recovered), and this site falls back to the platform default signature. Disable it?
zh: 关闭后将删除已保存的发件地址与签名密钥（密钥不可恢复），本站将改用平台默认签名。确定关闭吗？
